title: apiv2 stream events
body:
the events endpoint should be stream-based.  it also needed to be registered to answer and not produce 404s.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I tested this from cockpit-podman and can confirm it fixes the 404 and it also correctly streams events. Thank you!
